set_fields.description: Configuring Ralph with command flags is not ergonomic. Add `/ralph configure [task-id]` as the primary UI for inspecting and editing every field classified as user-configurable in Ralph loop state, including capability contracts and pacing/reflection/execution/sandbox settings.
set_fields.acceptance_criteria: `/ralph configure <task-id>` opens an interactive UI for that loop; `/ralph configure` resolves the current Ralph loop or shows a selector; the UI exposes every field classified configurable by tau-o6hb, including max iterations, items per iteration, reflection cadence/instructions, active tool contract, available-tool snapshot/refresh where appropriate, enabled agents, execution profile view/recapture, and sandbox profile view/recapture; required Ralph control tools are displayed as system-managed and cannot be disabled; non-configurable runtime fields are visible as read-only where useful; changes persist to .pi/loops/state/<task-id>.json; unsafe active-child edits show a clear warning; tests cover command target resolution and persisted edits for at least one scalar field plus tools and agents.
set_fields.title: Implement complete /ralph configure interactive TUI
